query: INSERT INTO users (email, password, role, first_name, last_name, is_verified, verification_token, verification_token_expires_at, reset_token, reset_token_expires_at, pending_email, email_change_token, email_change_token_expires_at, sessions_valid_after, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) RETURNING id as "id!: i64", email as "email!: String", password as "password!: String", role as "role!", first_name as "first_name: String", last_name as "last_name: String", is_verified as "is_verified!: bool", verification_token as "verification_token: String", verification_token_expires_at as "verification_token_expires_at: ::sqlx::types::chrono::NaiveDateTime", reset_token as "reset_token: String", reset_token_expires_at as "reset_token_expires_at: ::sqlx::types::chrono::NaiveDateTime", pending_email as "pending_email: String", email_change_token as "email_change_token: String", email_change_token_expires_at as "email_change_token_expires_at: ::sqlx::types::chrono::NaiveDateTime", sessions_valid_after as "sessions_valid_after!: i64", created_at as "created_at!: ::sqlx::types::chrono::NaiveDateTime"
